title: Reading Excel format problem “numFmt” is invalid
author: TalenWei
body:
When I read xlsx, the cell has a format, but the output is not output according to the format

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9e7656bb-0082-43a8-af41-a359625e9173)

According to the format, the data should be 8
